headline: Domino’s Announces Changes to Board of Directors
summary: Domino’s Pizza, the largest pizza company in the world, announced the appointment of Michael C. Creedon, Jr. and Anneliese Olson to its Board of Directors and the election of Corie Barry as the Lead Independent Director of the Board. Barry replaces Richard Federico who will continue to serve as a member of the Board and as Chairman of the Audit Committee. “We’re pleased […]

headline: Domino's Pizza Inc (NASDAQ:DPZ): A Quality Dividend Stock with Strong Growth and Profitability
summary: Domino’s Pizza (DPZ) offers a 2.65% dividend yield with 25.99% annual growth, backed by top-tier profitability and a solid health rating, making it a strong pick for dividend-focused portfolios.
